name: gjsify
description: The full JavaScript ecosystem, native on GNOME

scripts.test:e2e: node --test tests/lint-engines.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/create-app/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-only/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-only-pnp/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/pnp-zip-static-reads/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/standalone-plugin/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/native-install/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-config/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cli-config-input/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/inline-static-reads/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/library-multi-build/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/gsettings/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/define-from-pkg/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/text-loader/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/css-bundling/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/dlx-native-prebuilds/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/dlx-version-pin/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/cjs-require-stream/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/plugins-by-name/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/shebang-string/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/build-watch/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/test-runner/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/flatpak/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/flatpak-sync/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/flatpak-diff/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/flatpak-release/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/self-host/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/native-install-project/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/workspace-install/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/foreach-command/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/run-command/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/install-immutable/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/install-version-conflict/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/install-script/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/uninstall-global/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/biome/run.mjs && node --test tests/e2e/upgrade/run.mjs
scripts.npm:publish: gjsify run build && gjsify run build:examples && gjsify foreach -v --no-private --exclude '@girs/*' --exec -- gjsify publish --tolerate-republish --tag latest --access public
scripts.build: gjsify run build:infra && gjsify foreach build -tp --no-private --exclude '@girs/*' --exclude '@gjsify/example-*' --exclude '@gjsify/website' --exclude '@gjsify/cli' --exclude '@gjsify/vite-plugin-blueprint' --exclude '@gjsify/vite-plugin-gettext' --exclude '@gjsify/rolldown-plugin-pnp' --exclude '@gjsify/rolldown-plugin-deepkit' --exclude '@gjsify/rolldown-plugin-gjsify' --exclude '@gjsify/create-app' --exclude '@gjsify/utils' --exclude '@gjsify/events' --exclude '@gjsify/terminal-native' --exclude '@gjsify/process' --exclude '@gjsify/assert' --exclude '@gjsify/unit' && gjsify workspace @gjsify/cli build:gjs-bundle
scripts.build:infra: gjsify workspace @gjsify/vite-plugin-blueprint build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/vite-plugin-gettext build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/rolldown-plugin-pnp build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/rolldown-plugin-deepkit build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/rolldown-plugin-gjsify build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/create-app build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/semver build:types && gjsify workspace @gjsify/npm-registry build:types && gjsify workspace @gjsify/tar build:types && gjsify workspace @gjsify/workspace build:types && gjsify workspace @gjsify/cli build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/utils build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/events build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/terminal-native build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/process build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/assert build && gjsify workspace @gjsify/unit build

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
